instruction: Part of the Toronto ops work is already in motion. Please check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send support@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.
canonical_instruction: Some of the Toronto ops work is already in motion. Please check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send support@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the existing Toronto ops setup, added the missing next step, and left the review block and daily check in place.

initial_state_overrides.ops/ops-resume-notes.txt: Toronto partial ops notes already captured.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Toronto resumed ops next step' --priority medium --due 2026-03-10

email send --to support@example.com --subject 'Toronto ops resume recap' --body 'I checked the existing Toronto ops setup, added the missing next step, and left the review block and daily check in place.'
